title: CHAPTER 43-A.  PUBLIC SCHOOL CHOICE-Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 43-A.  PUBLIC SCHOOL CHOICE

§4035.  Short title

This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Public School Choice Act".

Acts 2014, No. 853, §1, eff. June 23, 2014.

CHAPTER 43-A.  PUBLIC SCHOOL CHOICE
§4035.  Short title
